comment:
Ограничение: \(\sin x\ne 0 \Rightarrow x\ne\pi n,n\in Z\)
Пусть \(\dfrac{1}{\sin{x}} = t \ \Rightarrow\)
$$t^2+t-2=0\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t=1\\ t=-2 \end{array} \right.\\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \frac{1}{\sin x} =1\\ \frac{1}{\sin x} =-2 \end{array} \right.\\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \sin x=1\\ \sin x=-\frac{1}{2} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=\frac{\pi }{2} +2\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=-\frac{\pi }{6} +2\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=-\frac{5\pi }{6} +2\pi n,n\in Z \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x=\frac{\pi}{2}+2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=-\frac{\pi}{6}+2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=-\frac{5\pi}{6}+2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\).
